examples: The waters of the tropics are invitingly clear.
Large parts of South Sudan are invitingly fertile.
It might help to invest in an invitingly bound notebook and keep a journal of your thoughts and hopes.
John Terry's clearance struck Nani and rolled invitingly into Rooney's path for the simplest of finishes.
Another Guzan parry fell invitingly and this time Jelavic slotted home into the bottom corner from 10 yards.
